creator: pgj@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

On Thu, Aug 27, 2009 at 7:30 PM, James Bailie<jimmy@mammothcheese.ca> wrote=
:
> =A0New distfile has been created on 8/27/09! =A0New checksums needed!

I saw that the port (version 4.169) has been marked broken on sparc64
recently, because it does not link.  Does this new distfile fix this
problem?

Cheers,
:g
